title: Commander Nagisa and Kaji 222
wikitext:
[]: Commander Nagisa and Kaji 2.22             Quote Post by Pluto » Sat Mar 13, 2021 2:13 am Introduction Welcome to the second of Edition of Commander Nagisa and Kaji, where we try to figure out what the hell happened in that last scene with Kaji and Kaoru as well as the events of the Third Impact. I’ve been scouring Japanese youtube for clues and while I don’t think we have a definitive conclusion or even general consensus, the observations, connections, and clues gathered from the previous films have been detailed and consistent. Please scroll down to the spoiler text at the bottom if you missed Part 1. Table of Contents 1. Context of the Scene (Added 4/7) 2.The Kaji-Kaoru Conversation 3.The 14 Year Time Skip Timeline 4.Part 1 Context of the Scene SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: The Commander and that guy [spoilers]             Quote Post by IsAnnoGodOrATroll » Sat Mar 13, 2021 4:54 am Lots of interesting tidbits there! The helicopter in Central Dogma being Kaji's and him using it to stop the Third Impact is actually something I can see! Maybe the Blu-Ray might have some more additional scenes/shots related to this, or at least I hope there are. The original 3.0 preview does come true in a lot of ways huh... Thanks for the translation! The JP fandom really are starting their deep dives. Wish I could fully understand Japanese and see what's going over there but alas, I don't speak the language.

[]: Re: The Commander and that guy [spoilers]             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Sat Mar 13, 2021 5:04 am Would have been more interesting if Kaji had hijacked Gendo's donkey and used it to stop 3rd impact.

[]: Re: The Commander and that guy [spoilers]             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sat Mar 13, 2021 5:26 am Very interesting and the idea that Kaji's soul in Mark.06 does raise interesting possibilities! I'll have to think about all this. Moreover, in the last conversation between Kaoru and Kaji in Q, Kaoru says “Ryo-chan was able to help me.”

[]: Re: The Commander and that guy [spoilers]             Quote Post by Konja7 » Sat Mar 13, 2021 6:32 am The dialogue in 3.0+1.0 strongly implies that Near Third Impact was the cause of the terrible state of Earth in 3.0. So maybe Kaji or Wille wanted Instrumentality (or something similar), so he could repair the state of the Earth, but Third Impact was unleashed for some reason. It seems the Third Impact (like the Fourth Impact) don't seem to harm people or Earth at the end. I guess it's because there were sacrifices to stop it (a sacrifice is needed to stop an Impact). PS: In the translation I read, Kaworu says "Thank you. I was also saved by Ryou-chan ". Was that a mistake?

[]: Re: The Commander and that guy [spoilers]             Quote Post by melonpan » Sat Mar 13, 2021 7:13 am Thank you for this post! I think this is something that will keep getting brought up and expanded upon as time passes and as we get more accurate source material to work with (the blu-rays). Very exciting. I have a feeling that the connection between the preview for Q and what is revealed in Shin in regards to Kaji and Kaworu will mean we can possibly look at other shots in that preview to connect some dots, since it definitely doesn't seem like all of that was scrapped or irrelevant.

[]: Re: The Commander and that guy [spoilers]             Quote Post by Zusuchan » Sat Mar 13, 2021 12:26 pm Thanks for this, Pluto! Kaji being inside Mark.06 is exactly the sort of thing I could see Anno doing and it does create several interesting possibilities. For example, I believe some have already pointed out that Misato in Shin has several parallels to NGE!Gendo-now Kaji has parallels to NGE!Yui, too! (I'm specifying "NGE" here because I'd rather wait until I've seen Shin in whatever way before saying Misato, Kaji and Kaji Jr. are parallels for the Ikari family of NTE, too.)

[]: Re: The Commander and that guy [spoilers]             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Sat Mar 13, 2021 1:33 pm And this time I will jump to Shin Evangelion. In the flashback scene, leaving Misato behind, Kaji puts his life on the line to stop the third impact. At this time, I think there is an image of Lilith fused with Unit 06. At this stage, I don’t think the two spears that were in Lilith in Q pierced Lilith or Unit 6.

[]: Re: The Commander and that guy [spoilers]             Quote Post by Ah Q » Sat Mar 13, 2021 3:12 pm Pluto wrote: [editor’s note: There’s a scene where Kaji says goodbye to Misato and he takes off in the Nerv Helicopter thing. Then it shows Lilith rising during the third impact and it’s head is the Mark 06 body and all (we’ve seen the dead version in Q).

[]: Re: The Commander and that guy [spoilers]             Quote Post by Blockio » Sat Mar 13, 2021 5:28 pm That's some galaxy brain stuff right there. Thanks for sharing it, this makes a ton of sense!

[]: Re: Commander Nagisa and Kaji             Quote Post by Pluto » Sat Mar 13, 2021 8:53 pm UrsusArctos wrote: Moreover, in the last conversation between Kaoru and Kaji in Q, Kaoru says “Ryo-chan was able to help me.”

[]: Re: Commander Nagisa and Kaji             Quote Post by Konja7 » Sat Mar 13, 2021 9:52 pm Pluto wrote: The second impact was the cleanse (purify) the ocean, the third was to purify the land, and the fourth is to purify the souls [to become core], IIRC. It seems maybe Wille planned a coup and something went wrong with respect to Shinji's awakening. Then again, we don't know how long it was from when Unit 01 was pierced by the lance to the awakening of Lilith.

[]: Re: Commander Nagisa and Kaji             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sat Mar 13, 2021 11:57 pm By the way about Lilith - The glow in the eyes is from the illuminated Seele crest, which isn't actually any brighter than it was in 1.0. So Lilith's eyes aren't glowing, even if it is clear that there's something going on with her.

[]: Re: Commander Nagisa and Kaji             Quote Post by Pluto » Sun Mar 14, 2021 12:11 am UrsusArctos wrote: By the way about Lilith - The glow in the eyes is from the illuminated Seele crest, which isn't actually any brighter than it was in 1.0. So Lilith's eyes aren't glowing, even if it is clear that there's something going on with her.

[]: Re: The Commander and that guy [spoilers]             Quote Post by DantesInferno » Sun Mar 14, 2021 2:17 am Ah Q wrote: Pluto#915151 wrote: [editor’s note: There’s a scene where Kaji says goodbye to Misato and he takes off in the Nerv Helicopter thing. Then it shows Lilith rising during the third impact and it’s head is the Mark 06 body and all (we’ve seen the dead version in Q).

[]: Re: Commander Nagisa and Kaji             Quote Post by DantesInferno » Sun Mar 14, 2021 2:26 am Off-topic, another thing I noticed is how the core-ified train car that floats in the air just outside the village (as well as the power line towers) has some “strings of light” passing through it, very much like the ones Wunder uses to lift other objects in the air (Eva Unit-08, the warships, etc.), although these are red, not white. This seems to suggest that the same physical principle would be responsible for the “antigravity” effect in both cases. Not sure what would be the “source” of the antigravity (or for that matter, what keeps the earth core-ified after the impact, in the absence of an active anti-L system).

[]: Re: The Commander and that guy [spoilers]             Quote Post by Konja7 » Sun Mar 14, 2021 5:06 am DantesInferno wrote: The part where Kaji says farewell looks pretty much like N3I near the end of 2.0 (the background, the red vortex in the sky, Misato and ritsuko side by side, and what they’re wearing unless I'm mistaken); this is quite confusing since third impact proper is supposed to happen long after N3I.

[]: Re: The Commander and that guy [spoilers]             Quote Post by Pluto » Sun Mar 14, 2021 5:40 am SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Commander Nagisa and Kaji             Quote Post by Heaven Piercing Man » Sun Mar 14, 2021 6:03 pm Also, when and why were the NHGs built? Was the birth of WILLE related to the theft of the NHG Buße before it was renamed Wunder?

[]: Re: Commander Nagisa and Kaji             Quote Post by DantesInferno » Sun Mar 14, 2021 9:09 pm Heaven Piercing Man wrote: Also, when and why were the NHGs built? Was the birth of WILLE related to the theft of the NHG Buße before it was renamed Wunder?
